raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation rehearsing boundary assertion and guilt-free disengagement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "energetic boundaries exist and can be maintained without verbal explanation",
    "subjective incoherence is a sufficient warrant for non-engagement",
    "withdrawal can and should occur without accompanying guilt",
    "a bare 'no' carries adequate interpersonal and internal legitimacy"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a set of parallel affirmations; mixes psychological and energetic registers without logical contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker accurately perceives boundary violations or misaligned interactions, possesses adequate self-regulation, and applies the stance in contexts where continued engagement would be genuinely harmful or non-reciprocal",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the speaker uses the statements to avoid necessary conflict resolution, mislabels ordinary disagreement as incoherence, or deploys them to justify abrupt withdrawal that damages relationships or evades accountability"
}
